title: 4 Service Stocks Poised to Beat Estimates This Earnings Season
text: Here we pick four business service stocks, namely, Avis Budget Group, Inc. (CAR), Verisk Analytics, Inc. (VRSK), Gartner, Inc. (IT) and Aptiv PLC (APTV), which are likely to pull off earnings surprise this season.

title: Branch Accelerates Growth and Customer Satisfaction with Verisk's In-Depth Views of Household Risk
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio and JERSEY CITY, N.J., Jan. 25, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Branch is delivering fast, simple transactions for consumers that improve the customer experience and lift conversion rates by integrating granular reliable data on household risk from Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider.

title: Insurers Can Access Detailed Hail, Tornado Analytics with Verisk's New Respond® Solutions
text: Hail Impact Energy and Tornado Probability provide comprehensive, real-time data following severe weather events Hail Impact Energy and Tornado Probability provide comprehensive, real-time data following severe weather events

title: Munich Re upscaling human rights due diligence using Verisk's ESG risk analytics
text: LONDON, Jan. 17, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Munich Re, a leading global provider of reinsurance, primary insurance and insurance-related risk solutions, has selected Verisk's global risk analytics business, Verisk Maplecroft, to help it enhance human rights due diligence across the entire enterprise.

title: 3 Stocks to Watch From the Prospering Business Information Industry
text: The pandemic-induced demand spike for risk mitigation, cost reduction and productivity improvement solutions should help the Zacks Business-Information Services industry prosper. EXPGY, VRSK and IKTSY are well poised to benefit from this surge.
